title: stellaria japonica
intro: Stellaria japonica, also known as the Japanese starwort or creeping starwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches and menstrual cramps, and protecting against oxidative stress. Stellaria japonica is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
